meta.question: In this model, will the choreography always reach an end node? (Model ID: 0ae2e7d8093840cc8a65c475b6275cae)
meta.finalAnswer: In the choreography model with ID 0ae2e7d8093840cc8a65c475b6275cae, it is not guaranteed that the process will always reach an end node. The model includes an ExclusiveGateway (sid-701610E9-E50F-4ACF-A9A6-0A39810A9287) that can direct the flow back to a previous ChoreographyTask (sid-75061C84-FC28-4C56-800B-810B59EF62FA), creating a potential loop that could prevent the process from ever reaching the EndEvent (sid-2DA6A5A1-C759-4B7B-8681-966A30672ACC).

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "0ae2e7d8093840cc8a65c475b6275cae" .
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have identified the elements of the model. Now I need to map the properties to understand the flow structure and verify if all paths lead to an end node.

The flow analysis shows that the choreography starts at a StartEvent, proceeds through tasks, and uses an ExclusiveGateway to either loop back to a task or proceed to an EndEvent. Since the gateway can loop back, it is possible for the process to continue indefinitely without reaching the end node.
